items.name: ACCESSIBILITY_SETTING_EXPANDED_TEXT
items.purpose: Stores the value (true/false) of the Expanded Text accessibility menu setting so that a guest user's choice is remembered. Preferences.

items.name: ACCESSIBILITY_SETTING_INCREASED_TEXT_SPACING
items.purpose: Stores the value (true/false) of the Increased Text Spacing accessibility menu setting so that a guest user's choice is remembered. Preferences.

items.name: ACCESSIBILITY_SETTING_REDUCED_MOTION
items.purpose: Stores the value (true/false) of the Reduced Motion accessibility menu setting so that a guest user's choice is remembered. Preferences.

items.name: ACCESSIBILITY_SETTING_UNDERLINED_LINKS1
items.purpose: Stores the value (true/false) of the Underlined Links accessibility menu setting so that a guest user's choice is remembered. Preferences.

items.name: COMMERCE_COMPARE_cpDefinitionIds_commerceChannelGroupId
items.purpose: Stores the products ids appended with the channel id for comparing products. Preferences.

items.name: GUEST_LANGUAGE_ID
items.purpose: Stores the preferred language ID to use when the user's language ID is not available so the system displays content in the appropriate language. Preferences.

items.name: LOGIN
items.purpose: Stores the user's id, screen name, or email address depending on the configured authentication type to remember their login. Preferences

items.name: OAUTH2_REMEMBER_DEVICE_
items.purpose: Stores the authorization grant of a registered OAuth2 application so that users can skip the authorization flow from a previously authorized device. Preferences

items.name: PASSWORD
items.purpose: Stores the encrypted user password to identify a previously logged in user. Preferences

items.name: REMEMBER_ME
items.purpose: Stores the end user's preference (true/false) to remember their login details. Preferences

items.name: SAML_SP_SESSION_KEY
items.purpose: Stores a randomly generated string for keeping the SAML SP (Service Provider) session alive and allowing it to participate in SAML SLO (Single Log Out). Preferences.

items.name: SAML_SSO_SESSION_ID
items.purpose: Stores the session id for the end user to stay logged in with the SAML IdP (Identity Provider). Preferences.

items.name: SELECTED_CATEGORIES_COOKIE_
items.purpose: Stores the selected categories for facilitating the addition of more than 400 categories when opening the categories selector popup. Preferences.

items.name: _com_liferay_portal_search_admin_web_portlet_SearchAdminPortlet_userID_hideReindexConfirmationModal
items.purpose: Stores the value (true/false) of the user's decision whether to permanently hide the reindex confirmation dialog, so the user's preference can be honored. Preferences.

items.name: com.liferay.commerce.wish.list.model.CommerceWishList#groupId
items.purpose: Stores the wishlist id appended with the group id for a guest user to link it to their account once they log in. Preferences

items.name: com.liferay.search.experiences.web_addSXPElementSidebar
items.purpose: Stores the current state (open/closed) of the Add Query Elements sidebar in Search Blueprints, so the sidebar has the correct state when the user returns from a different section. Preferences.

items.name: liferay.cookie.consent
items.purpose: Stores the end user's consent option (true/false) for the use of cookies through fragments. Preferences.

items.name: maintenanceSeen
items.purpose: Stores whether the user has frequently dismissed the server maintenance message (true/false) so Analytics Cloud stops displaying it. Preferences.

items.name: sidebar
items.purpose: Stores whether the sidebar is open (true/false) so it can be displayed the same way when the user returns to Analytics Cloud. Preferences.
